role_summary: the gst manager leads gst compliance and advisory functions while managing teams and  complex gst matters.
responsibilities: • oversee end -to-end gst compliance   • review gst returns, reconciliati ons, and reports   • handle complex gst advisory and structuring   • manage gst audits and litigation support   • lead and mentor gst compliance teams   • liaise with tax authorities and senior management
qualifications: • qualified ca   • advanced expertise in gst and  indirect taxes   • team leadership and stakeholder management skills
